name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling headphones with 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and crystal-clear hands-free calling. Premium sound quality with LDAC support.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (3rd Gen)
description: Active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and adaptive audio. Up to 6 hours listening time with ANC enabled, 30 hours total with case. IPX4 water resistant.

name: Samsung 65" QLED 4K Smart TV
description: Quantum Dot technology delivers brilliant color with 100% Color Volume. Neo Quantum Processor 4K, Object Tracking Sound, and built-in Alexa and Google Assistant.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description: High-precision 8000 DPI sensor, whisper-quiet clicks, ergonomic design, and MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling. Works on any surface including glass.

name: Nike Dri-FIT Running T-Shirt
description: Lightweight, breathable Dri-FIT fabric wicks sweat away from your body to help keep you dry and comfortable during runs. Reflective design elements for low-light visibility.

name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
description: Iconic slim fit sits below the waist with a slim leg. Made with stretch denim for all-day comfort. Available in multiple washes including dark indigo and black.

name: Patagonia Better Sweater Fleece Jacket
description: Classic fleece jacket made from 100% recycled polyester fleece. Zip-up design with stand-up collar and zippered hand pockets. Fair Trade Certified sewn.

name: Under Armour UA Tech 2.0 Polo Shirt
description: Classic polo design with Under Armour HeatGear technology. Moisture-wicking, anti-odor, and UPF 30+ sun protection. Perfect for golf or casual wear.

name: Wilson Evolution Indoor Basketball
description: Premium composite leather cover for exceptional feel and control. Exclusive laid-in channels for better grip and responsiveness. Official size and weight (29.5").

name: Garmin Forerunner 265 GPS Running Watch
description: AMOLED display with advanced running dynamics, race predictor, daily suggested workouts, and up to 15 days battery life in smartwatch mode. ANT+ and Bluetooth connectivity.

name: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells
description: Adjusts from 5 to 52.5 pounds in 2.5-pound increments. Replaces 15 sets of weights. Space-efficient design with molded storage tray. Perfect for home gym.

name: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat
description: 6mm thick, ultra-dense cushioning for superior joint protection. Non-slip surface with excellent grip. Lifetime guarantee, eco-certified with no harmful PVC plasticizers.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
description: Laser reveals microscopic dust on floors. Piezo sensor counts and sizes particles, automatically increasing power when needed. 60-minute run time on lowest setting.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
description: 7-in-1 multi-use programmable pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, saute pan, yogurt maker, and food warmer. 6-quart capacity, 13 built-in smart programs.

name: Philips Hue Smart Bulb Starter Kit
description: Includes 3 A19 color bulbs and Hue Bridge. 16 million colors, compatible with Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit. Control with voice or the Hue app.

name: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee Machine
description: One-touch coffee brewing with centrifusion technology. Brews 5 cup sizes: Espresso, Double Espresso, Gran Lungo, Mug, and Alto. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth enabled for remote control.

name: iPad Air 13-inch (M2 chip)
description: Stunning 13-inch Liquid Retina display with M2 chip for next-level performance. USB-C connector, Touch ID, 10-hour battery life. Compatible with Apple Pencil Pro.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23 Running Shoes
description: Continental rubber outsole for extraordinary grip. Responsive BOOST midsole returns energy with every stride. Breathable Primeknit+ upper adapts to the shape of your foot.

name: TRX All-in-One Suspension Trainer
description: Professional-grade suspension training system with door anchor, mesh carry bag, and workout guide. Supports up to 350 lbs. Used by professional athletes and military.

name: Casper Original Foam Mattress (Queen)
description: Three layers of premium foam for the perfect balance of comfort and support. Zoned Support System targets 7 different zones. CertiPUR-US certified. 100-night trial.
